title: Emails not syncing properly on Thunderbird for Android (IMAP issue?)
creator: seoguru262
content:
Hi everyone,

I recently set up my email on Thunderbird for Android to manage messages related to my website (https://vehiculoss.com ). The setup went smoothly, but I’m facing an issue where emails are not syncing consistently.

Sometimes new emails don’t appear unless I manually refresh, and occasionally sent emails take time to show up across devices. I’m using IMAP, so I expected real-time syncing between mobile and desktop.

Here’s what I’ve already tried:

Checked IMAP/SMTP settings (they seem correct) Disabled battery optimization for the app Ensured background data is enabled

Still, the issue persists. Could this be related to sync frequency settings, server delays, or something specific to the Android version of Thunderbird?

If anyone has faced something similar or has suggestions, I’d really appreciate the help.
